content.rendered:
We provide a range of warehouse solutions tailored to help your company grow.

Our warehouse network across KSA enables us to service your short and long-term storage needs such as:

Climate controlled warehousing – to store many types of products including those that need special handling conditions such as freezers for storing frozen products, humidity-controlled environments for delicate products, such as produce or flowers, and dirt-free facilities for handling highly sensitive computer products

  • Bonded warehousing – to store imported products for which import duty is yet to be paid
  • Distribution centers – to store products that is considered very temporary. NTF warehouses can serve as points in your distribution system where products are received from your suppliers and quickly shipped out to your customers
  • General warehousing – to keep food or products dry and secure
  • Long term storage warehousing – to store products and documentation
  • Value adding warehousing – NTF warehouse staff are able to further process your products to support your specific market requirements
  • Bulk and specialised warehousing – to store grains, minerals or other specialised products.

With NTF’s state of the art scanning and labelling technology, and a computerised inventory and stock control systems, your company will have complete visibility of its product movements.
